MINI MINUTES:

James Coy Driscoll, Esq., for Judgment Creditor and moving party: Ming M. Quan
Zhao Hua J, judgment debtor in Propria Persona, appeared with Mandarin Interpreter: Michael Zhao

After hearing, The Claim of exemption is Denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
